positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of intertwined bioluminescent flora and cosmic nebula elements. The primary subject is a central Mandala-like arrangement featuring stylized ferns, glowing abstract vines, and clusters of crystalline stardust. Use deep midnight blues, vibrant emerald greens, glowing magenta accents, and touches of gold foil texture for maximum contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly detailed, designed to look excellent as a screen-printed apparel graphic. Minimalist vector art aesthetic mixed with intricate watercolor texture. Flat digital design, clean lines, high contrast, isolated on a solid dark background.
